# @platform/tooling-terraform

Terraform workflow tooling: module patterns, provider version locks, and workspace management scripts.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/tooling-terraform
Version: 0.1.0
Component: tooling-terraform
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: delivery
Bounded context: terraform-workflow
Owner: team-platform
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: tooling
Class: active.tooling
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: annual
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: false
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Define reusable Terraform module patterns for the platform's infrastructure primitives
- Maintain provider version locks across all Terraform configurations
- Provide workspace management scripts for environment-specific state isolation
- Enforce Terraform formatting and validation in pre-commit and CI

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not define the AWS resource topology (owned by infra-aws)
- Does not manage Terraform Cloud or remote state backend configuration
- Does not own secrets or credential management for Terraform runs

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Terraform modules defined here are consumed by infra-aws configurations
- Workflow scripts are invoked by tooling-ci as part of the infrastructure apply pipeline

## Operational notes

- Provider version locks must be updated deliberately ? patch without review is not allowed
- All Terraform modules must pass tflint and tfsec before merge
